channel.title: GitHub Fortran Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Fortran in GitHub

item.title: xianyi/OpenBLAS
item.description: OpenBLAS is an optimized BLAS library based on GotoBLAS2 1.13 BSD version.

item.title: cp2k/cp2k
item.description: Quantum chemistry and solid state physics software package

item.title: wrf-model/WRF
item.description: The official repository for the Weather Research and Forecasting (WRF) model

item.title: QEF/q-e
item.description: Mirror of the Quantum ESPRESSO repository. Please do not post Issues or pull requests here. Use gitlab.com/QEF/q-e instead.

item.title: OpenFAST/openfast
item.description: Main repository for the NREL-supported OpenFAST whole-turbine and FAST.Farm wind farm simulation codes.

item.title: E3SM-Project/E3SM
item.description: Energy Exascale Earth System Model source code.

item.title: Unidata/netcdf-fortran
item.description: Official GitHub repository for netCDF-Fortran libraries, which depend on the netCDF C library. Install the netCDF C library first.
